ATTY. LEO M. LAROCCA OF THE LAW OFFICES OF NIVEN & SMITH, LLP, TEL. NO. 1-415-981-5451 APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANT SOTHEBY'S INTERNATIONAL.

RULING - The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows: Defendants Mary Lace And Sotheby'S International Realty, Inc'S Joinder In Defendants' Special Motion To Strike Under C.C.P. Section 425.16 is GRANTED. The complaint's allegations all relate to petitioning activities, and plaintiff's opposition makes no attempt to establish a likelihood that he will prevail. Instead, plaintiff merely recycles his complaint's largely incoherent assertions (e.g., "criminal fraud court process," "the facts plead in the complaint establish," "the foregoing is plaining plead") without submitting any evidence.
